history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a man
Angel kamera/framing: eye-level medium shot, slightly angled from the left, capturing the subject from the mid-chest down to just above the knees, with the background elements of a white picket fence and lush greenery with purple flowers framing the scene. The composition is centered on the subject, with a shallow depth of field blurring the background, creating a bokeh effect.
Outfit: The subject is wearing an oversized, cream-colored hooded sweatshirt. The hoodie has a slightly textured, matte finish, appearing to be made of a soft cotton blend. The hood is pulled up slightly, with the subject's hands holding the drawstrings on either side. Across the chest of the hoodie is a bold graphic print. The letters "CHMB" are printed in a distressed, black, sans-serif font, appearing slightly raised or textured. Below the letters are two prominent star graphics. The star on the left is a deep, rich purple, while the star on the right is a vibrant, electric blue. Both stars have a slightly fuzzy or pixelated edge. Underneath the hoodie, a white t-shirt with a visible crew neck peeks out from the bottom hem. The subject is also wearing black, knee-length athletic shorts made of a smooth, possibly nylon or polyester material, with a subtle sheen.
pose: The subject is standing with his body angled slightly to the right, facing partially away from the camera. His head is turned to the left, looking off into the distance with a contemplative or slightly serious expression. His eyes are focused, and his brow is slightly furrowed. His hands are raised, each holding a drawstring of the hoodie, pulling it slightly taut around his face. His shoulders are relaxed, and his posture is natural and unforced, giving a sense of candidness.
enviroment: The background features a charming outdoor setting. Directly behind the subject is a white, wooden picket fence, with vertical slats spaced evenly apart. Beyond the fence, lush green foliage with clusters of small, delicate purple flowers cascades down. To the right, a white wooden structure, possibly a house or a garden shed, is visible with a closed door and decorative hardware. The ground beneath the fence appears to be a mix of dirt and scattered leaves. The overall atmosphere is bright, airy, and slightly rustic, suggesting a warm, sunny day.
lighting: The scene is illuminated by bright, natural sunlight, likely from the late morning or early afternoon. The light source appears to be coming from the upper right, casting soft shadows on the left side of the subject and the background elements. The overall lighting is bright and even, with no harsh contrasts, highlighting the textures of the clothing and the vibrant colors of the flowers and stars. The bright light creates a cheerful and inviting mood, with a slight warmth to the overall tone.
Final style: highly detailed, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect
